song.title: Glory, Glory
song.lyrics:
[V1] Glory, glory the Father! Glory, glory the Son! Glory, glory the Spirit! Glory to the three in one.
[C] Let us praise Him Let us praise Him Praise our God the three in one. Give Him glory Give Him glory Wonderous things for us our God has done.
[V2] Praise the Father who has purposed! Praise the Son who all has done! Praise the Spirit who transmitteth! Praise the Three who work as one!
